description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large windows and multiple outdoor living spaces. The structure is primarily white with wooden accents, and it is set on a rectangular plot with landscaped green areas and several trees. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the rear showcases a spacious deck with seating, a hot tub, and a small pool. The side yards are landscaped with shrubs and additional seating areas, and there is a detached circular treehouse or gazebo structure in the garden. The bungalow has a mix of open and enclosed spaces, with expansive glass doors and windows providing ample natural light. The overall layout is open and inviting, blending indoor and outdoor living seamlessly.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wooden accents, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a deck, pool, and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the rear, highlighting the spacious deck, hot tub, pool, and garden features, with the main building and treehouse visible in the background.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side elevation, emphasizing the length of the bungalow, the arrangement of windows, and the outdoor seating and garden structures.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the bungalow, featuring the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side elevation, focusing on the side windows, green areas, and the relationship between the main building and the detached garden structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
